name: PMAY Urban Housing Guidance (Sample Record)
description: Sample record for households seeking current urban housing assistance information.

benefit.description: Benefits depend on beneficiary category and programme rules.

other_conditions: Verify city, household, and income rules through the official portal.

ai_explanation.summary: This sample helps urban households locate official housing-assistance information.
ai_explanation.eligibility_reason_template: Confirm household category and city availability.

source.organization: Ministry of Housing and Urban Affairs

name: PMAY Gramin Housing Guidance (Sample Record)
description: Sample record for rural households seeking official housing programme guidance.

benefit.description: Assistance is subject to rural household and programme verification.

other_conditions: Verify rural household eligibility on the official portal.

ai_explanation.summary: This sample points rural households to the official PMAY Gramin information source.
ai_explanation.eligibility_reason_template: Confirm household data and local programme availability.
tips: Check status with local authorities if needed.
frequently_asked_questions: How do I check my status?
next_steps: Use the official PMAY Gramin portal.
